property.name: configJson
property.description-key: Colored info under fields by exact value match. JSON: { fields:[{ field, type?, dedupe?, wrap?, maxLength?, options:[{ value, info, background, textColor?, wrap?, maxLength? }] }] }. type optional/auto-detected. value format -> choice/bool/multiselect: number (bool 0/1); text: string (case-insensitive); number/currency: dot decimal e.g. 0.5; date: YYYY-MM-DD. Full copy-paste example in the EXAMPLE_CONFIG constant in index.ts and the solution README.
